info.title: Warnel Chawpiovs
info.author: Wololo
info.details: A card game based on a well known cooperative board game, with full rules enforcement, to play solo or (ultimately) multiplayer. Defeat villains with your team of heroes\nThese archives do not include resource files (images in particular). Resources will be automatically downloaded when the game starts (and it can take a while), unless you provide a separate "core.zip" file with those resources

changelog:
v1.5.0
- Added 9 new heroes and their associated cards: Nebula, Gamora, Drax, Wolverine, Venom, Nightcrawler, Scarlet witch, Phoenix, and Valkyrie. This represents roughly 300 new cards.
- Vastly improved the rendering on most devices. If the game looked heavily "pixelated" in previous releases to you, you might want to give this new version a try. Depending on your case, the game possibly went from "text is unreadable and images have an aliasing problem" to "this now looks ok"
- Performance improvements ingame, which now should make the 4 heroes experience in particular much more playable.

Note: as always, MacOS build is untested

v1.4.1
Bug fixes from 1.4.0

v1.4.0
- Adds support for "Mutant Genesis" expansion, Winter Soldier Hero Pack, Ant-Man Hero Pack, Wasp Hero Pack, Quicksilver Hero Pack, and Star-Lord Hero Pack:
  - New heroes : Winter Soldier, Ant-Man, Wasp, Quicksilver, Star-Lord, Colossus, and Shadowcat
  - New villains: Sabretooth, Sentinel, The Mold, the Brotherhood (Pyro, Avalanche, Blob, Toad), and Magneto
- Added support for Android
- Overall improved card pictures quality with better resizing parameters. For people who update from a previous version, it is recommended to delete card pictures (either manually in your user folder, or from the advanced settings in the game) and let the game redownload them.
- QoL improvements:
  - Bug Fixes and visual improvements related to heroes changing form, and villain stage defeat
  - improvements related to card messages and hints (for interrupts, etc...)
  - Scenario description/flavor now shown at the beginning of each scenario
  - Added an "advanced settings" sections to access a bunch of "hidden" settings such as the size of preview cards
- Various bug fixes
  - Mac display should look better. There was an issue on retina screens where everything looked pixelated, and hopefully this should be fixed. A caveat is that menu screens might be super small now. (Please note that I still do not officially support the Mac release)
  - Lots of fixes surrounding "defense" and "declaring a defender" mechanics
  - Fixed a regression (introduced in 1.3.0) that crashed the multiplayer lobby
  - Introduced multiple layers of caching which should improve loading speeds and in-game framerate. The loading screen in particular should be reasonably fast the second time you run the game and moving forward (first run remains slow as it does a lot of processing and caching)


Note: as always, MacOS build is untested

v1.3.0
- Adds support for "Galaxy's Most Wanted" expansion , Black Widow Hero Pack, Thor Hero Pack, Hulk Hero Pack, Ms. Marvel Hero Pack:
  - New heroes : Black Widow, Thor, Hulk, Ms. Marvel, Rocket Raccoon and Groot
  - New villains: Drang, The Collector (2 scenarios), Nebula, and Ronan the Accuser
- Added a Deck Editor
- Various bug fixes

v1.2.0
- Adds support for "Sinister Motives" expansion , Doctor Strange Hero Pack, War Machine Hero Pack:
  - New heroes : Spider-Man Miles Morales, Ghost Spider, Doctor Strange, and War Machine
  - New villains: Sandman, Venom, Mysterio, The sinister 6, and Venom-Goblin
- Download of pictures now happens in the background
- Various bug fixes

Note: MacOS build is untested

v1.1.0
Adds support for "The Mad Titan's Shadow" and "Captain America" Hero pack:

- New heroes : Adam Warlock, Spectrum, and Captain America
- New villains: Ebony Maw, Tower Defense, Thanos, Hela, and Loki
- Support for music and sound
- Various bug fixes

Note: MacOS build is untested

v1.0.0
- Adds support for "The Rise of Red Skull":
  - New heroes : Spider-Woman and Hawkeye
  - New villains: Absorbing Man, Crossbones, Taskmaster, Zola, Red skull
- "Adventure Mode" is a new gameplay feature (and now the default) in which you have to win games to unlock heroes/villains. It can be deactivated in the options to unlock everything directly
- The game is now much more "verbose" with popups that give details on what's going on. These can be dismissed for a given game by selecting "don't show this tip again" or entirely deactivated in the options (Options > Gameplay > Notifications > "Expert")
- "Text mode" is now considered playable. This allows to play if you can't or won't download image files. You might want to open the settings.json file and set "load_cards_online": false to avoid the game trying to download image resources on startup. (Note: you still need the set definitions to be downloaded from marvelcdb)
- Caped FPS to 60FPS
- Various bug fixes

Initial release. Supports 5 heroes and 3 villains
